chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-894 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 09.08.2023 None present for petitioners. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Assistant Attorney General. ----- Petitioners have prayed that respondents No.1 to 4 be directed to appoint them to suitable posts as per their qualification. There is neither any public advertisement nor any vacancies are shown. Learned Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan has apprised us that previously his two nephews and a son were appointed without any cause. We have perused the memo of the petition and in para 6 it is claimed that OGDCL is passing lines from the lands of the petitioners but they have not been able to appoint the petitioners as their employees. In a way the petitioners are seeking quid pro quo if at all the lines are being laid down in some of their lands as claimed. This could hardly be a ground to seek appointment at any suitable post as prayed in the petition. Dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
